nasb.text: He made the utensils which were on the table, its dishes and its pans and its bowls and its jars, with which to pour out drink offerings, of pure gold.

esv.text: And he made the vessels of pure gold that were to be on the table, its plates and dishes for incense, and its bowls and flagons with which to pour drink offerings.

cnv.text: 又用純金做桌子的器皿，就是盤子、碟子、碗和奠酒用的杯。

ccb.text: 又用纯金造桌子上的器具，就是盘、碟及献酒用的杯和瓶。
